title: The Bachelor's Daughters
writer: Andrew L. Stone, Frederick J. Jackson
actors: Gail Russell, Claire Trevor, Ann Dvorak
plot: A semi-trifle with Adolphe Menjou as a department store floorwalker who is persuaded by four husband-seeking salesgirls---two-bordering-on-three of which were well beyond the "girl" stage---to pose as their father in a Long Island...
